learner_goal: I want to explain why vaccines work.

metadata.core_thesis: Immune memory depends on a safe preview creating durable response memory.
governing_assumptions: Source-less route is provisional until learner evidence accumulates.

backbone.principle: Safe preview creates durable response memory.

clusters.label: Memory bridge
clusters.description: The local bridge between safe exposure and faster later response.

subnodes.label: Immune memory
subnodes.mechanism: A vaccine safely presents antigen, matching immune cells expand, memory cells remain, and those cells respond faster later.

learner_scaffold.task_cue: Use your own words before reading the study note.
learner_scaffold.tailoring_anchor: Connect the launch attempt to one local causal bridge.
learner_scaffold.entry_prompt: In your own words, why does a safe preview make the later response faster?
learner_scaffold.expected_shape: safe preview -> immune selection -> memory -> faster later response
learner_scaffold.blank_hint: Name what remains after the preview.
learner_scaffold.evidence_goal: The learner reconstructs how immune memory links safe exposure to faster response.

first_node.label: Immune memory
first_node.mechanism: A vaccine safely presents antigen, matching immune cells expand, memory cells remain, and those cells respond faster later.

first_node.blank_hint: Name what remains after the preview.
first_node.evidence_goal: The learner reconstructs how immune memory links safe exposure to faster response.

agent_contract.truth_contract: Agents propose moves. Training store records events. Derivation decides truth. Graph displays only derived evidence.

events.text: Vaccines show the immune system a safer preview so it can react faster later.
A vaccine presents antigen safely and the immune system keeps memory cells.

evaluation.agent_response: You named pieces of Immune memory, but not the causal step that links first request to later speed — what must happen in between?
evaluation.gap_description: Name the missing causal step in Immune memory and how it creates the later faster result.

events.text: Memory cells preserve the faster response after the safe antigen preview.
A vaccine safely presents antigen, matching immune cells expand, memory cells remain, and those cells respond faster later.
The repaired link is that memory cells connect the first safe exposure to the faster later response.

evidence_holds.reason: The spaced answer was solid, but this node remains primed because the first attempt was not strong. Current derivation requires two strong reconstructions separated by spacing before solidified.

llm_calls.job: Create a provisional map hypothesis and first reconstruction target.
llm_calls.failure_mode_to_guard: Treating generated route topology as learner evidence.

llm_calls.job: Elicit the learner's current model before recognition or model-bridge material.
llm_calls.failure_mode_to_guard: Leaking the answer before the learner generates.

llm_calls.job: Classify attempts for the orchestrator without mutating graph truth.
llm_calls.failure_mode_to_guard: Letting an LLM classification override training derivation.

llm_calls.job: Find the missing causal process and express it as a mechanism-first repair slot (hinge + in-domain contrast).
llm_calls.failure_mode_to_guard: Naming a vague gap instead of one fillable causal link.

llm_calls.job: Write one curious in-domain question from hinge_focus and contrast_prompt (sanitized scaffold slots).
llm_calls.failure_mode_to_guard: Quoting tutor/rubric phrasing or revealing the missing mechanism in the drill question.

llm_calls.job: Force own-words reconstruction of the missing link.
llm_calls.failure_mode_to_guard: Counting scaffold echo or circular repair as proof.
